description: Per-page QA route manifest. Derived from docs/SPEC.md. Each route's expectations are the acceptance criteria the visual-QA agent verifies against the rendered preview.

routes.title: Home / Dashboard
routes.specRef: §2 domain model — Workspace, Worker, Task; §8 live subsystems

expectations.desc: Active workers panel or count is visible
expectations.specClaim: Workers table tracks agent execution sessions; dashboard surfaces active runners

expectations.desc: Pending or completed task counts are surfaced
expectations.specClaim: task.status lifecycle: pending → completed, visible in coordination layer

expectations.desc: Recent activity feed is present, OR a recognisable empty-state hero is shown when no activity
expectations.specClaim: Dashboard reflects task/worker lifecycle for new and active workspaces alike

expectations.desc: Page renders without visible JS/render errors or broken layout

routes.title: Missions list
routes.specRef: §2 Mission — first-class goal, status, scheduleId, maxConcurrentTasks

expectations.desc: Mission cards or list rows are rendered (or an empty-state if none exist)
expectations.specClaim: Mission is a first-class entity with status: active | paused | completed | archived

expectations.desc: Mission status badge is visible on each row
expectations.specClaim: Mission status stored, health derived; both must surface in UI

expectations.desc: Create / New Mission button or link is present and navigable
Page renders without visible errors or broken layout

routes.title: Mission detail
routes.specRef: §2 Mission — workingBranch, primaryPrUrl, requiresReview, maxConcurrentTasks, dependsOnMission
routes.paramHint: Use any existing mission ID. Skip if no missions exist.

expectations.desc: Task list for the mission is visible
Primary PR link is shown if a working branch / PR exists
Notes / mission feed section is present
Page renders without visible errors

routes.title: Team / Roles
routes.specRef: §2 Role/Skill — isRole, model, allowedTools, canDelegateTo, color; §3 default roles: Organizer, Builder, Researcher

expectations.desc: Role cards (Organizer, Builder, Researcher at minimum) are rendered
expectations.specClaim: Default roles seeded per workspace: Organizer, Builder, Researcher

expectations.desc: Each role shows active-worker count or idle indicator
expectations.specClaim: Roles are claim-time routing constraints; UI should reflect load

expectations.desc: Roles are scoped to the current workspace (not mixing team-global with workspace-override unexpectedly)
Page renders without visible errors

routes.title: Tasks list / Activity
routes.specRef: §2 Task — status lifecycle, mode, outputRequirement, roleSlug; §4 GET /api/tasks

expectations.desc: Task rows are rendered with status badges visible
expectations.specClaim: task.status: pending → assigned → in_progress → review → completed/failed

expectations.desc: Status filter or sort controls are present
expectations.specClaim: Tasks API supports filtering; UI should expose it

expectations.desc: New task button is present and navigable
Page renders without visible errors

routes.title: Task detail
routes.specRef: §2 Task — status, Worker.waitingFor, milestones, prUrl; sibling bug task 4818f4f8 (status badge stuck on Assigned)
routes.paramHint: Use a recently-completed task. The status badge MUST NOT read 'Assigned' for a completed task.

expectations.desc: Status badge reflects actual task.status — MUST NOT be stuck on 'Assigned' for a completed/in_progress task
expectations.specClaim: task.status lifecycle is canonical; badge must track it (sibling bug 4818f4f8)

expectations.desc: Worker card or execution details visible (progress, cost, turns) for tasks that have been claimed
expectations.specClaim: Worker: status, costUsd, turns, milestones, prUrl

expectations.desc: PR link visible for tasks where a PR was created
Edit / Reassign / Delete actions are present and appear wired (not dead buttons)
Page renders without visible errors

routes.title: Create task form
routes.specRef: §2 Task — title, description, roleSlug, priority, outputRequirement; §4 POST /api/tasks

expectations.desc: Task creation form renders with title and description fields
Role selector is present to route to a specific role
Submit button is present and appears wired
expectations.specClaim: POST /api/tasks returns new task; should navigate to task detail

expectations.desc: Form renders without visible errors
Settings page renders without a blank screen or error
expectations.specClaim: Workspace config (gitConfig, releaseConfig) must be editable

expectations.desc: Key config toggles (e.g. auto-merge, CI retries) are present
Page renders without visible errors

verdictVocabulary.MATCHES-SPEC: Element/behaviour is present and matches the spec claim
verdictVocabulary.CONTRADICTED: Element is built but behaves contrary to the spec claim
verdictVocabulary.DOCUMENTED-NOT-BUILT: Spec claims this should exist but it is absent from the rendered UI
verdictVocabulary.SHIPPED-NOT-DOCUMENTED: UI shows something not mentioned in spec — flag for spec backfill

vercelPreviewBypass.notes: Set this header on every request to bypass Vercel preview protection

appAuth.notes: Pre-authenticated Playwright storage state (JSON) containing the session cookie. Generate once with the setup script, store as encrypted secret.
